features.name: nonblocking assignment to same signal in multiple always blocks
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned with non-blocking assignment (<=) in two different always blocks, where one block is clocked (posedge clock) and another is combinational (edge-sensitive to a data signal)

features.name: parameter-controlled for loop affecting nonblocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a for loop controlled by a parameter where the loop iteration count affects whether a non-blocking assignment to a signal will execute

features.name: conditional nonblocking assignment inside always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a signal that is conditionally executed based on a parameter value inside an always block
